scripts.bot: node -e "import('./lib/bot.js').then(({handleBotMessages}) => { handleBotMessages(); console.log('🤖 Bot started in polling mode'); })"
scripts.bot:webhook: node -e "import('./lib/bot.js').then(({bot}) => { const url = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL || 'https://abbaacarraa.com'; bot.telegram.setWebhook(`${url}/api/bot/webhook`).then(() => console.log('✅ Webhook set')).catch(e => console.error('❌ Webhook failed:', e)); })"
scripts.bot:info: node -e "import('./lib/bot.js').then(({bot}) => { bot.telegram.getWebhookInfo().then(info => console.log('📡 Webhook Info:', info)).catch(e => console.error('❌ Failed:', e)); })"
scripts.bot:delete: node -e "import('./lib/bot.js').then(({bot}) => { bot.telegram.deleteWebhook().then(() => console.log('✅ Webhook deleted')).catch(e => console.error('❌ Failed:', e)); })"
